Normalized form: *-*-* 06:00:00
    Next elapse: Sat 2026-06-20 06:00:00 PDT
       (in UTC): Sat 2026-06-20 13:00:00 UTC
       From now: 2h 50min left
   Iteration #2: Sun 2026-06-21 06:00:00 PDT
       (in UTC): Sun 2026-06-21 13:00:00 UTC
       From now: 1 day 2h left

       From now: 2 days left
